                for i, ref in enumerate(references[:20]):
                    doc.add_paragraph(f"{i+1}. {ref}")
                doc.save(output_path)

                import pandas as pd
                with pd.ExcelWriter(output_path, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
                    pd.DataFrame({"信息": ["标题", "作者", "关键词", "摘要"], 
                                  "内容": [title, authors.strip(), keywords, abstract.strip()]}).to_excel(writer, sheet_name="基本信息", index=False)
